Dietitian
Licensed Dietitian Guide

Issued by the Wyoming Dietetics Licensing Board under the Wyoming Department of Administration & Information. Data verified for 2026.

Total Initial Fee
$200
$200 initial application fee
Renewal
$200
Every 2 years + CE hours
Processing Time
1 to 2 Weeks
Subject to board volume
License Duration
2 Years
From date of issuance
Board Contact

Cheyenne, WY 82002

Fax: (307) 777-3508

Email

Credential Categories

Wyoming Dietitian License Types

Licensed Dietitian

The credential required to practice dietetics in Wyoming. Wyoming is a 'Practice Act and Title Protection state', meaning you must hold this license to provide dietetic services.

Application Process

How to Apply for a Wyoming Licensed Dietitian

Complete Education & Supervised Practice

Earn a master's degree and complete coursework from an ACEND-accredited program. Finish a minimum of 1,000 hours of supervised dietetics practice.

Pass the CDR Examination

Successfully pass the Commission on Dietetic Registration (CDR) Registration Examination for Dietitians. Verification of current RD status satisfies this.

Submit the Application to the Board

Complete the application form, gather required proof of citizenship, and submit the packet along with the $200 fee to the Wyoming Dietetics Licensing Board.

Provide Verification Documents

Ensure that the Commission on Dietetic Registration sends official verification of your active RD status directly to the Board.

Required Documents

Application Document Checklist

  • Official Application PacketApplication accurately filled out along with proof of U.S. citizenship or lawful presence.
  • CDR Registration VerificationProof of active registration sent directly from the CDR.
Practice Laws

Provisional Practice & Reciprocity

Provisional Rules

Wyoming regulations do not feature a standard provisional or temporary state license. You must complete the CDR examination before applying.

Reciprocity & Endorsement

Wyoming offers licensure by endorsement. Applicants holding a valid and unrestricted license in another state with equivalent requirements, or holding active CDR registration, can apply using the standard application method by demonstrating out-of-state verification.

Frequently Asked Questions

Wyoming Dietitian FAQ

How much does a Wyoming dietitian license cost?

The initial license application fee is $200.

When does the Wyoming license need to be renewed?

Wyoming dietitian licenses expire biennially. The renewal fee is $200.

Is licensure required to practice in Wyoming?

Yes, Wyoming has a Practice Act that legally mandates obtaining a state license to practice dietetics and to use the protected title of Dietitian.
